name: Americas Uranium Corp.
description: Americas Uranium Corp. (formerly Allied Strategic Resource Corp.) is a uranium exploration company listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange. The company holds the Ford Lake Property, a uranium project comprising approximately 7,430 hectares at the southern edge of the Athabasca Basin in north-central Saskatchewan. The company is focused on advancing its Athabasca Basin uranium assets, including properties near Cameco's Cigar Lake and Key Lake mining operations, and is at the early exploration stage.
